description: Add a paragraph about how you need a liability waver to play if you’re younger than 18. This is the president’s words

name: Johnson County Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Johnson County Family YMCA in Buffalo, WY! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.
